title: Rikos ja rangaistus: Kuusiosainen romaani ynnä epilogi
summaries: "Rikos ja rangaistus" by Fyodor Dostoyevsky is a novel first published in 1866. An impoverished former law student in Saint Petersburg plans to murder a pawnbroker, convincing himself that extraordinary men can commit crimes for higher purposes. After carrying out the deed, he spirals into psychological torment, consumed by guilt, paranoia, and horror. His intellectual justifications crumble as he confronts the internal and external consequences of his actions in this exploration of morality and conscience.
